title: Protein Synthesis & Secretion Pathway
steps: 1. DNA transcription in Nucleus produces mRNA.
2. mRNA travels to Ribosomes attached to Rough Endoplasmic Reticulum (RER).
3. Ribosomes translate mRNA into amino acid polypeptide chains.
4. Proteins pass into RER lumen for initial folding.
5. Transport vesicles carry folded proteins to Golgi Apparatus.
6. Golgi modifies, packages, and dispatches finished proteins via secretory vesicles to target destinations.
